note: OIC bull call spread — defined risk
warnings: very high IV — prefer spread; watch earnings crush

exit_plan.cut_loser: exit if premium ≤ -30% from entry (do not hope)
exit_plan.stagnant: if 2 sessions pass with |opt| <8% and underlying <2% move → exit
exit_plan.big_move: after +40% premium, trail: exit if give back 25% of peak premium
exit_plan.time: flat by 5 DTE — no lottery holds
exit_plan.goal: catch big moves; cut dead trades; react
